leadText: Venom Drench (Japanese: ベノムトラップ Venom Trap) is a non-damaging Poison-type move introduced in Generation VI. It was TR91 in Pokémon Sword and Shield.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VI to VIII [ edit | edit source ] Venom Drench lowers the Attack , Special Attack , and Speed stats of all poisoned targets by one stage. If no targets are poisoned, the move will fail. Venom Drench can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , giving an extra three points if Poison Gas , Poison Powder , Toxic , or Toxic Spikes were used in the prior turn. If powered up by a Poisonium Z into Z-Venom Drench, the user's Defense stat rises by one stage. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Venom Drench cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target. S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD It lowers an enemy's Attack, Sp. Atk, and Travel Speed when it's poisoned or badly poisoned. * It lowers the enemy's Attack, Sp. Atk, and Travel Speed. It will fail unless the enemy is poisoned or badly poisoned, so be careful. *
